next_action: Run /kbd-apply p16-c006-config-truth-tracker-reconcile (Round 2's last change — depends on c001, done). Round 1 and c003 of Round 2 are complete.
note: Round 1 is fully COMPLETE: p16-c001, p16-c002, p16-c004, and p16-c005 all archived. c003 (Kiln sandbox + authz) is now ALSO archived: fixed the check_capabilities(granted, granted) no-op — requested (component's declared manifest capabilities) is now compared against granted, independently computed per-capability via Cedar (action naming kiln:capability:<name>; caller=None/BGW and no-Pep-attached cases trust requested wholesale, matching the existing kiln:invoke Cedar-skip precedent) — denial now happens before instantiate_async, not silently. Added mandatory bearer auth to /functions/v1/<name> (caller=None now unreachable from that HTTP path) and to /admin/functions (register_function + list_functions), the latter also requiring role==service_role. Deliberately DEFERRED (flagged as task_91a44033, its own follow-up): wiring flint:host@0.1.0's actual host-side Db/Llm/Kv/Identity/Secrets functions into the linker — the WIT contract (wit/flint/host/world.wit) exists but flint-skill is explicitly guest-only SDK scaffolding with no host-side implementation anywhere; this is substantial new engineering (5 new host functions each touching a different backend, Secrets needing careful default-deny/audit semantics), not a bug fix, and wasn't safely completable alongside this change's P0 items without its own design review. cargo clippy --workspace and cargo test --workspace both fully green (the fke-sign-cosign blocker noted in c005's entry, task_7d88a8a6, has since resolved). Round 2's remaining change: p16-c006 (config-truth-tracker-reconcile) depends on c001 (done) — safe to start.
